# claude-personal-assistant

> A complete, de-identified operating system for a Claude Code-based personal AI agent named **Eric**.
> Ships a skill activation matrix, SDAR self-improvement framework, modular skills, hooks system,
> slash-command set, and a sanitization pipeline for safe public publishing.
> Creator: @notaneric. License: MIT.

## Operating Manual

[CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md), The full Eric operating manual for Claude Code. Load this as your
system prompt foundation. Contains: identity, prompt defense baseline, skill activation matrix
(routing table mapping task types to skills), SDAR summary, and all operating rules
(security, context, design, content, research, planning, communication). Always-on constraints only;
task-specific knowledge lives in skills.

## Agent Entry Point

[AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md), Cross-tool entry point for agent ingestion. Explains the repo structure,
how to selectively adopt capabilities (single skill, routing matrix, SDAR loop, hooks, or full
clone), the Always/Ask-first/Never boundary table, and a concrete one-skill adoption example.
Open with an injection-safety adoption-note preamble.

## Self-Improvement System

[sdar/README.md](sdar/README.md), Full SDAR (Self-Distilled Agentic RL) algorithm: UCB retrieval,
sigmoid gate formula, skill endorsement/attenuation logic. Use this to understand or reproduce
the learning loop.

[sdar/skill_bank.template.json](sdar/skill_bank.template.json), Neutral-prior skill bank template
(uses: 0, avg_reward: 0.5 for all entries). Copy and populate with your own skill domains to
start the SDAR loop from a blank slate.

## Skills

[skills/grill-me/SKILL.md](skills/grill-me/SKILL.md), Adversarial plan stress-tester. Activates
before any significant design direction, architecture decision, or new feature. Finds problems
before build starts.

[skills/humanizer/SKILL.md](skills/humanizer/SKILL.md), Prose quality gate. Strips AI tells
("delve into", "it's important to note"), filler openers, em-dash overuse, and vague adjectives.
Auto-activates on any writing or copy task.

[skills/verification-before-done/SKILL.md](skills/verification-before-done/SKILL.md), Enforces
visual or runtime verification before any task is declared complete. Prevents false "done"
declarations without evidence.

[skills/prompt-quality-gate/SKILL.md](skills/prompt-quality-gate/SKILL.md), Catches vague,
conflicting, or low-density prompts before execution. Flags the issue and proposes a restructured
version for approval.

[skills/generate-evaluate-repair/SKILL.md](skills/generate-evaluate-repair/SKILL.md), 3-step
constrained generation loop: generate (minimal prompt) → evaluate (list failures, not a score)
→ repair (targeted fixes). Outperforms single mega-prompts on complex constrained tasks.

[skills/skill-bank/SKILL.md](skills/skill-bank/SKILL.md), UCB-scored skill retrieval and SDAR
update logic. Checks the skill bank before any task, retrieves top-k skills by domain, and wires
the sigmoid gate update at session end.

[skills/context-discipline/SKILL.md](skills/context-discipline/SKILL.md), Context window hygiene:
compact triggers at ~60% usage, clear-point detection, MCP count limits, and session strategy
(continue vs. fresh start). Keeps the context window healthy over long sessions.

## External Skills (referenced by link, not vendored)

These are third-party skills available at the links below. Reference them in your activation matrix
rather than copying their files into this repo.

- **Design taste filter**, [impeccable](https://github.com/pbakaus/impeccable)
- **Fan-out research with citation verification**, [deep-research](https://github.com/dzhng/deep-research)
- **Knowledge graph builder**, [graphify](https://github.com/safishamsi/graphify)
- **Social-scored research (Reddit/X/YouTube/HN/GitHub)**, [last30days](https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill)

## Rules

[.claude/rules/security.md](.claude/rules/security.md), Prompt defense baseline, permission deny
list patterns, untrusted content handling, secrets access via password manager, memory security,
skill supply-chain scanning, and observability requirements for autonomous loops.

[.claude/rules/performance.md](.claude/rules/performance.md), Model tier routing (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus),
effort levels (low/medium/high/xhigh/max), external model offload lane, message array discipline
for cache optimization, context window discipline, and session strategy.

[.claude/rules/agents.md](.claude/rules/agents.md), Multi-agent orchestration: parallel dispatch,
subagent design principles, delegation triggers, structured output format, eval loop pattern,
generate→evaluate→repair loop, MCP scope rule, memory architecture (3 tiers), and hooks reference.

## Configuration

[.claude/settings.example.json](.claude/settings.example.json), Sanitized template for Claude
Code settings. Includes hooks (PreToolUse gate for irreversible actions, postToolUse formatters,
stop hook for session audit), permissions allowlist, and MCP config stubs.

## Commands

[.claude/commands/](`.claude/commands/`), Slash command implementations. Includes: `/learn`
(session feedback → skill bank update), `/reflect` (pattern analysis → CLAUDE.md improvements),
`/status` (current skill scores + vault stats), `/grill` (adversarial stress-test), `/research`,
`/design`, `/write`, and more.

## Docs

[docs/SETUP.md](docs/SETUP.md), First-time configuration: identity, knowledge vault path,
permissions, and verification steps.

[docs/CUSTOMIZATION.md](docs/CUSTOMIZATION.md), How to extend skills, add commands, write new
rules, and adapt the skill activation matrix to your own workflow.

[docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md), System design: SDAR loop diagram, hook chain,
context flow, memory tier model (ephemeral/working/long-term).

## Scripts

[scripts/publish.sh](scripts/publish.sh), POSIX sanitization pipeline. Scrubs personal data
before any public push. Run before every sync to the public mirror.

[scripts/publish.ps1](scripts/publish.ps1), PowerShell equivalent of the sanitization pipeline.

[scripts/allowlist.example.yml](scripts/allowlist.example.yml), Default-deny allowlist for the
sync gate. Defines which paths and tokens are safe to publish.
